name: Lemonade Seller Simulator
description: Lemonade Seller Simulator is a fun and strategic business game where you run your own lemonade stand. Set prices, adjust recipes, manage supplies, and react to changing weather and customer demand. Grow from a small sidewalk stand into a neighborhood empire by making smart decisions and maximizing your daily profits! Web Dev https://www.crazygamesx.com.es/
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
